author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Root cause: PR #597 (GH#585) added register_active_key_as_trusted() in crosslink/src/sync/trust.rs:610, which runs every configure_signing() call and silently auto-adds the workspace signing key into allowed_signers as <agent_id>@crosslink. Because trust pending classifies a key as 'approved' if its principal is in allowed_signers, every published key shows as approved — yet complete_bootstrap() is only called from crosslink trust approve (commands/trust.rs:99). Result: meta/bootstrap.json stays 'pending' forever; with signing_enforcement='enforced' every sync bails with instructions that are impossible to follow (trust pending shows nothing, no agent-id to approve). Secondary: the new commit message 'trust: register signing key for ...' is NOT in BOOTSTRAP_MESSAGE_PREFIXES (sync/bootstrap.rs:29-34), so post-fix it would fail the enforcement audit.
